mapper.select: select * from app_wxpay_order t1 LEFT JOIN app_user t2 on t1.user_id=t2.id where t1.`status`='2' and t1.type='1' and t1.business_status='1'
mapper.update: update app_wxpay_order t1 set t1.business_status=#{wxPayOrderBusinessStatusOps} where t1.out_trade_no=#{out_trade_no}
mapper.select: select * from app_wxpay_order t1 where t1.out_trade_no=#{payNumber}
